questionHtml: Plot and label the production possibility curves for Country J and for Country H, assuming constant opportunity costs, on Figure 4.
markschemeHtml:
[1] for one correctly drawn production possibility curve
[2] for two correctly drawn production possibility curves

A response with missing or incorrect labels may be awarded a maximum of [1].
Kgs are not required on the axes.

meta.title: Plot and label the production possibility curves for Country J and for Country H, assuming constant opportunity costs, on Figure 4.
